title.en: Spain into World Cup final after victory over France
title.zh-CN: 西班牙战胜法国后进入世界杯决赛

summary.en: Spain are into the 2026 World Cup final after goals from Mikel Oyarzabal and Pedro Porro see them convincingly beat France 2-0 in their semi-final in Dallas.
summary.zh-CN: 在米克尔·奥亚尔扎巴尔（ Mikel Oyarzabal ）和佩德罗·波罗（ Pedro Porro ）的进球后，西班牙队进入了2026年世界杯决赛，他们在达拉斯的半决赛中令人信服地以2比0击败

title.en: Who 'came alive' in the semi-final? France v Spain player ratings
title.zh-CN: 谁在半决赛中“活了过来” ？法国v西班牙球员评分

summary.en: Spain produce a masterclass to see off France and reach their first World Cup final since 2010 - but who were the stars?
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙制作了一个大师班，将法国送走，并进入自2010年以来的第一个世界杯决赛-但谁是明星？

title.en: Arsenal agree fee for Trossard move to Besiktas
title.zh-CN: 阿森纳同意特罗萨尔搬到贝西克塔斯的费用

summary.en: Arsenal agree a transfer fee of about £17m (20m euros) to sell Belgium forward Leandro Trossard to Beskitas.
summary.zh-CN: 阿森纳同意约1700万英镑（ 2000万欧元）的转会费，将比利时前锋Leandro Trossard出售给Beskitas。

title.en: Why do Argentina sing about England and the Falklands?
title.zh-CN: 为什么阿根廷歌唱英格兰和福克兰群岛？

summary.en: While England see Argentina as football rivals, for Argentina the rivalry is much more than that.
summary.zh-CN: 虽然英格兰将阿根廷视为足球的竞争对手，但对阿根廷来说，竞争远不止于此。

title.en: Porro doubles Spain's lead over France
title.zh-CN: Porro将西班牙领先法国的地位翻了一番

summary.en: Pedro Porro plays a one-two with Dani Olmo and doubles Spain's lead against France in the semi-finals of the 2026 World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 佩德罗·波罗（ Pedro Porro ）与丹尼·奥尔莫（ Dani Olmo ）一对二，并在2026年世界杯半决赛中将西班牙对法国的领先优势加倍。

title.en: Oyarzabal coolly converts penalty to give Spain lead against France
title.zh-CN: Oyarzabal冷静地转换点球，让西班牙领先于法国

summary.en: Mikel Oyarzabal gives Spain the lead from the penalty spot during their semi-final against France after a clumsy challenge from Lucas Digne on Lamine Yamal.
summary.zh-CN: 米克尔·奥亚尔扎巴尔（ Mikel Oyarzabal ）在对阵法国的半决赛中，在卢卡斯·迪涅（ Lucas Digne ）对拉明·亚马尔（ Lamine Yamal ）的笨拙挑战之后，

title.en: All the goals from France's run to semi-finals
title.zh-CN: 从法国队到半决赛的所有进球

summary.en: Watch every goal scored by France on their way to the 2026 World Cup semi-finals and a mouth-watering tie against Spain.
summary.zh-CN: 观看法国在进入2026年世界杯半决赛的路上打进的每一个进球，以及与西班牙的比赛。

title.en: Spain's road to semi-final - every goal so far
title.zh-CN: 西班牙的半决赛之路-迄今为止的每一个进球

summary.en: Relive every goal Spain have scored on their way to the 2026 World Cup semi-finals, where a thrilling meeting with France at Dallas Stadium awaits.
summary.zh-CN: 重温西班牙在2026年世界杯半决赛中取得的每一个进球，在达拉斯体育场与法国队进行激动人心的会面。

title.en: Brighton sign Vuskovic from Spurs for club record £46m
title.zh-CN: 布莱顿从马刺签下Vuskovic ，获得俱乐部纪录£ 4600万

summary.en: Brighton sign Croatia defender Luka Vuskovic from Tottenham for a club record fee of £46m on a five-year contract, with an option for a further year.
summary.zh-CN: 布莱顿从托特纳姆热刺队签下了克罗地亚后卫卢卡·武斯科维奇（ Luka Vuskovic ） ，在一份为期五年的合同中获得了4600万英镑的俱乐部纪录费，还有一年的选择权。

title.en: Walked for 47% of the World Cup - the evolution of Messi
title.zh-CN: 走过世界杯的47 ％ -梅西的演变

summary.en: Lionel Messi is looking to beat England and reach a third World Cup final with Argentina. Guillem Balague looks at the evolution of one of the game's all-time greats.
summary.zh-CN: 莱昂内尔·梅西（ Lionel Messi ）希望击败英格兰，并与阿根廷队一起进入第三届世界杯决Guillem Balague着眼于游戏历史上最伟大的游戏之一的演变。

title.en: Arsenal sign Germany forward Baum from RB Leipzig
title.zh-CN: 阿森纳从莱比锡皇家足球队签下德国前锋鲍姆

summary.en: Arsenal have signed Germany forward Lisa Baum on a permanent deal from RB Leipzig.
summary.zh-CN: 阿森纳已经与德国前锋丽莎·鲍姆（ Lisa Baum ）签订了一份来自莱比锡的永久合同。

title.en: Who am I? Guess World Cup star No 37
title.zh-CN: 我是谁？猜猜世界杯明星37号

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?
summary.zh-CN: 你会在尽可能少的尝试中获得今天的玩家吗？

title.en: Huge haul of fake Scotland and England football strips seized in raid
title.zh-CN: 大量苏格兰和英格兰的假足球场在突袭中被查获

summary.en: The trading standards seizure in Edinburgh found about 58,000 strips and is estimated to be one of the largest of its kind in the UK.
summary.zh-CN: 爱丁堡的交易标准缉获量约为58,000条，估计是英国最大的交易标准之一。

title.en: Chermiti claims no plans to leave Rangers - gossip
title.zh-CN: Chermiti声称没有计划离开游骑兵-八卦

summary.en: Youssef Chermiti says he has no intention of leaving Rangers, but Celtic's Daizen Maeda repeats his ambition to play in England's Premier League as Heart of Midlothian are told one of their targets...
summary.zh-CN: Youssef Chermiti表示他无意离开流浪者队，但凯尔特人的Daizen Maeda重申了他在英格兰超级联赛中的雄心壮志，因为中洛锡安之心被告知他们的目标之一......

title.en: Spain book World Cup final place by beating lacklustre France
title.zh-CN: 西班牙击败平淡无奇的法国，预订世界杯决赛席位

summary.en: European champions Spain are into the World Cup final after beating lacklustre France 2-0 in Dallas.
summary.zh-CN: 欧洲冠军西班牙队在达拉斯以2比0击败低迷的法国队后进入了世界杯决赛。
